title: Junior Revenue Manager at Jubilant FoodWorks Capital India

jsonLd.title: Junior Revenue Manager at Jubilant FoodWorks Capital India
jsonLd.description:
Jubilant FoodWorks Capital India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Revenue Manager to join our dynamic team in Hyderabad. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Jubilant FoodWorks Capital India:
Jubilant FoodWorks Capital India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Ensure compliance with FSSAI, health, and safety regulations
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Plan and execute banquets, events, and MICE functions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Customer Relations
• Proficiency in Food Safety
• Proficiency in Crisis Management
• Proficiency in Opera PMS
• Proficiency in PMS Systems
• Proficiency in Tour Planning
• Proficiency in Housekeeping Standards
• Proficiency in Sommelier Skills

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Life and accident insurance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Hyderabad, Telangana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Jubilant FoodWorks Capital India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
